name: spec-intents
description: Intent-first agentic coding: the human authors intent, the agent never invents requirements. Three skills — scoping, build, check.

plugins.name: spec-intents
plugins.description: Intent-first agentic coding: the human authors intent, the agent never invents requirements. Ships scoping (interview the human to uncover requirements, surface edge cases, emit a one-page intent to the PR body plus a why-receipt to the decision log), build (implement in thin slices, each check written before the code and proven against real behavior, on an isolated branch), and check (an independent fresh-context Gate B that audits the diff against the intent, PASS/FAIL). No generated prose spec, no lifecycle. The code and its tests are the only source of truth.
